NKJV.1: To the Chief Musician. A Psalm of the sons of Korah. Oh, clap your hands, all you peoples! Shout to God with the voice of triumph!
NKJV.2: For the LORD Most High is awesome; He is a great King over all the earth.
NKJV.3: He will subdue the peoples under us, And the nations under our feet.
NKJV.4: He will choose our inheritance for us, The excellence of Jacob whom He loves. Selah
NKJV.5: God has gone up with a shout, The LORD with the sound of a trumpet.
NKJV.6: Sing praises to God, sing praises! Sing praises to our King, sing praises!
NKJV.7: For God is the King of all the earth; Sing praises with understanding.
NKJV.8: God reigns over the nations; God sits on His holy throne.
NKJV.9: The princes of the people have gathered together, The people of the God of Abraham. For the shields of the earth belong to God; He is greatly exalted.

KJV.1: To the chief Musician<S>5329</S>, A Psalm<S>4210</S> for the sons<S>1121</S> of Korah<S>7141</S>. O clap<S>8628</S> your hands<S>3709</S>, all ye people<S>5971</S>; shout<S>7321</S> unto God<S>430</S> with the voice<S>6963</S> of triumph<S>7440</S>. <sup>for: or, of</sup>
KJV.2: For the LORD<S>3068</S> most high<S>5945</S> is terrible<S>3372</S>; he is a great<S>1419</S> King<S>4428</S> over all the earth<S>776</S>.
KJV.3: He shall subdue<S>1696</S> the people<S>5971</S> under us, and the nations<S>3816</S> under our feet<S>7272</S>.
KJV.4: He shall choose<S>977</S> our inheritance<S>5159</S> for us, the excellency<S>1347</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S> whom he loved<S>157</S>. Selah<S>5542</S>.
KJV.5: God<S>430</S> is gone up<S>5927</S> with a shout<S>8643</S>, the LORD<S>3068</S> with the sound<S>6963</S> of a trumpet<S>7782</S>.
KJV.6: Sing praises<S>2167</S> to God<S>430</S>, sing praises<S>2167</S>: sing praises<S>2167</S> unto our King<S>4428</S>, sing praises<S>2167</S>.
KJV.7: For God<S>430</S> is the King<S>4428</S> of all the earth<S>776</S>: sing ye praises<S>2167</S> with understanding<S>7919</S>. <sup>with: or, every one that hath</sup>
KJV.8: God<S>430</S> reigneth<S>4427</S> over the heathen<S>1471</S>: God<S>430</S> sitteth<S>3427</S> upon the throne<S>3678</S> of his holiness<S>6944</S>.
KJV.9: The princes<S>5081</S> of the people<S>5971</S> are gathered together<S>622</S>, even the people<S>5971</S> of the God<S>430</S> of Abraham<S>85</S>: for the shields<S>4043</S> of the earth<S>776</S> belong unto God<S>430</S>: he is greatly<S>3966</S> exalted<S>5927</S>. <sup>princes: or, voluntary of the people are gathered unto the people of the God of Abraham</sup>

ESV.1: Clap your hands, all peoples! Shout to God with loud songs of joy!
ESV.2: For the LORD, the Most High, is to be feared, a great king over all the earth.
ESV.3: He subdued peoples under us, and nations under our feet.
ESV.4: He chose our heritage for us, the pride of Jacob whom he loves. Selah
ESV.5: God has gone up with a shout, the LORD with the sound of a trumpet.
ESV.6: Sing praises to God, sing praises! Sing praises to our King, sing praises!
ESV.7: For God is the King of all the earth; sing praises with a psalm!
ESV.8: God reigns over the nations; God sits on his holy throne.
ESV.9: The princes of the peoples gather as the people of the God of Abraham. For the shields of the earth belong to God; he is highly exalted!

NASB.1: For the choir director. A Psalm of the sons of Korah. O clap your hands, all peoples; Shout to God with the voice of joy.
NASB.2: For the LORD Most High is to be feared, A great King over all the earth.
NASB.3: He subdues peoples under us And nations under our feet.
NASB.4: He chooses our inheritance for us, The glory of Jacob whom He loves. Selah.
NASB.5: God has ascended with a shout, The LORD, with the sound of a trumpet.
NASB.6: Sing praises to God, sing praises; Sing praises to our King, sing praises.
NASB.7: For God is the King of all the earth; Sing praises with a skillful psalm.
NASB.8: God reigns over the nations, God sits on His holy throne.
NASB.9: The princes of the people have assembled themselves [as] the people of the God of Abraham, For the shields of the earth belong to God; He is highly exalted.

NLT.1:
Come, everyone! Clap your hands!
Shout to God with joyful praise!
NLT.2:
For the LORD Most High is awesome.
He is the great King of all the earth.
NLT.3:
He subdues the nations before us,
putting our enemies beneath our feet.
NLT.4:
He chose the Promised Land as our inheritance,
the proud possession of Jacob’s descendants, whom he loves. Interlude
NLT.5:
God has ascended with a mighty shout.
The LORD has ascended with trumpets blaring.
NLT.6:
Sing praises to God, sing praises;
sing praises to our King, sing praises!
NLT.7:
For God is the King over all the earth.
Praise him with a psalm.
NLT.8:
God reigns above the nations,
sitting on his holy throne.
NLT.9:
The rulers of the world have gathered together
with the people of the God of Abraham.
For all the kings of the earth belong to God.
He is highly honored everywhere.

WEB.1: For the Chief Musician. A Psalm by the sons of Korah. Oh clap your hands, all you nations. Shout to God with the voice of triumph!
WEB.2: For Yahweh Most High is awesome. He is a great King over all the earth.
WEB.3: He subdues nations under us, and peoples under our feet.
WEB.4: He chooses our inheritance for us, the glory of Jacob whom he loved. Selah.
WEB.5: God has gone up with a shout, Yahweh with the sound of a trumpet.
WEB.6: Sing praises to God, sing praises. Sing praises to our King, sing praises.
WEB.7: For God is the King of all the earth. Sing praises with understanding.
WEB.8: God reigns over the nations. God sits on his holy throne.
WEB.9: The princes of the peoples are gathered together, the people of the God of Abraham. For the shields of the earth belong to God. He is greatly exalted!

CSB17.1:
For the choir director. A psalm of the sons of Korah. [1] Clap your hands, all you peoples; ⓙ
shout to God with a jubilant cry. ⓚ
CSB17.2:
For the LORD, the Most High, is awe-inspiring,
a great King over the whole earth. ⓛ
CSB17.3:
He subdues peoples under us
and nations under our feet. ⓜ
CSB17.4:
He chooses for us our inheritance —
the pride of Jacob, whom he loves. ⓝ Selah
CSB17.5:
God ascends among shouts of joy,
the LORD, with the sound of trumpets. ⓐ
CSB17.6:
Sing praise to God, sing praise;
sing praise to our King, sing praise! ⓑ
CSB17.7:
Sing a song of wisdom, [1]
for God is King of the whole earth. ⓒ
CSB17.8:
God reigns over the nations;
God is seated on his holy throne. ⓓ
CSB17.9:
The nobles of the peoples have assembled
with the people of the God of Abraham. ⓔ
For the leaders [2] of the earth belong to God;
he is greatly exalted. ⓕ

AMP.1:
To the Chief Musician. A Psalm of the sons of Korah. O clap your hands, all you people;
Shout to God with the voice of triumph and songs of joy.
AMP.2:
For the LORD Most High is to be feared [and worshiped with awe-inspired reverence and obedience];
He is a great King over all the earth.
AMP.3:
He subdues peoples under us
And nations under our feet.
AMP.4:
He chooses our inheritance for us,
The glory and excellence of Jacob whom He loves. Selah.
AMP.5:
God has ascended amid shouting,
The LORD with the sound of a trumpet.
AMP.6:
Sing praises to God, sing praises;
Sing praises to our King, sing praises.
AMP.7:
For God is the King of all the earth;
Sing praises in a skillful psalm and with understanding.
AMP.8:
God reigns over the nations;
God sits on His holy throne.
AMP.9:
The princes of the people have gathered together as the people of the God of Abraham,
For the shields of the earth belong to God;
He is highly exalted.

MSG.1:
A psalm of the sons of Korah
Applause, everyone. Bravo, bravissimo!
Shout God-songs at the top of your lungs!
MSG.2:
God Most High is stunning,
astride land and ocean.
MSG.3:
He crushes hostile people,
puts nations at our feet.
MSG.4:
He set us at the head of the line,
prize-winning Jacob, his favorite.
MSG.5:
Loud cheers as God climbs the mountain,
a ram's horn blast at the summit.
MSG.6:
Sing songs to God, sing out!
Sing to our King, sing praise!
MSG.7:
He's Lord over earth,
so sing your best songs to God.
MSG.8:
God is Lord of godless nations—
sovereign, he's King of the mountain.
MSG.9:
Princes from all over are gathered,
people of Abraham's God.
The powers of earth are God's—
he soars over all.

NIV.1:
Psalm 47
For the director of music. Of the Sons of Korah. A psalm.
Clap your hands, all you nations;
shout to God with cries of joy.
NIV.2:
How awesome is the Lord Most High,
the great King over all the earth!
NIV.3:
He subdued nations under us,
peoples under our feet.
NIV.4:
He chose our inheritance for us,
the pride of Jacob, whom he loved. Selah
NIV.5:
God has ascended amid shouts of joy,
the Lord amid the sounding of trumpets.
NIV.6:
Sing praises to God, sing praises;
sing praises to our King, sing praises.
NIV.7:
For God is the King of all the earth;
sing to him a psalm of praise.
NIV.8:
God reigns over the nations;
God is seated on his holy throne.
NIV.9:
The nobles of the nations assemble
as the people of the God of Abraham,
for the kings of the earth belong to God;
he is greatly exalted.

NRSVCE.1:
Clap your hands, all you peoples;
shout to God with loud songs of joy.
NRSVCE.2:
For the LORD, the Most High, is awesome,
a great king over all the earth.
NRSVCE.3:
He subdued peoples under us,
and nations under our feet.
NRSVCE.4:
He chose our heritage for us,
the pride of Jacob whom he loves. Selah
NRSVCE.5:
God has gone up with a shout,
the LORD with the sound of a trumpet.
NRSVCE.6:
Sing praises to God, sing praises;
sing praises to our King, sing praises.
NRSVCE.7:
For God is the king of all the earth;
sing praises with a psalm.
NRSVCE.8:
God is king over the nations;
God sits on his holy throne.
NRSVCE.9:
The princes of the peoples gather
as the people of the God of Abraham.
For the shields of the earth belong to God;
he is highly exalted.

NET.1: All you nations, clap your hands! Shout out to God in celebration!
NET.2: For the sovereign LORD is awe-inspiring; he is the great king who rules the whole earth!
NET.3: He subdued nations beneath us and countries under our feet.
NET.4: He picked out for us a special land to be a source of pride for Jacob, whom he loves. (Selah)
NET.5: God has ascended his throne amid loud shouts; the LORD has ascended his throne amid the blaring of ram’s horns.
NET.6: Sing to God! Sing! Sing to our king! Sing!
NET.7: For God is king of the whole earth! Sing a well-written song!
NET.8: God reigns over the nations! God sits on his holy throne!
NET.9: The nobles of the nations assemble, along with the people of the God of Abraham, for God has authority over the rulers of the earth. He is highly exalted!
